about.title: About ASK Real Estate
about.subtitle: ASK Real Estate W.L.L — Bahrain's most trusted property firm since 2016.
about.story_p1: ASK Real Estate was founded in 2016 with a clear ambition: to build a real estate firm that clients could trust completely — one that combined world-class brokerage expertise with RICS-accredited valuation, professional property management, and integrated facility services under a single roof.
about.story_p2: Today, ASK manages over 2,800 residential and commercial units, has closed hundreds of transactions across Bahrain, and holds accreditations from RERA, the Royal Institution of Chartered Surveyors (RICS), and the International Valuation Standards Council (IVSC). Our ISO 9001-certified quality management system ensures every client interaction meets the highest professional standard.
about.story_p3: Our Seef District office serves clients across every price point and property type — from first-time renters to institutional investors managing multi-building portfolios. We answer WhatsApp messages personally — no call centers, no chatbots, no junior offshore desks.
about.cta_text: Talk to one of our consultants — most properties are matched in a single conversation.

timeline.y2016: ASK Real Estate founded in Bahrain
